bucket_path.title: Bucket Path
bucket_path.description: The path to the Hugging Face Bucket to read from. Format: hf://buckets/{username}/{bucket}/{path}/

file_format.title: File Format
file_format.description: The format of files in the bucket. Used for schema inference.

reader_options.title: Reader Options
reader_options.description: JSON string with reader options (e.g., separators, encoding).

token.title: Hugging Face Token
token.description: Your Hugging Face token for authentication. Required for private buckets.
